title: Roasted Pungent Brazilian Egg Rolls Pilaf
description: A hearty Brazilian dish featuring roasted egg rolls, steamed rice, and sautéed vegetables, all seasoned with pungent spices. This dish is perfect for a cold winter day when you need something to warm your belly and soothe your soul.

ingredients.name: 1 cup mixed vegetables (such as carrots, peas, and corn)

instructions: Soak 4 cedar planks in water for at least 30 minutes.
In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil. Add the rice and reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is tender and fluffy.
Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Sprinkle the spice mixture over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Arrange the egg rolls on the preheated cedar planks. Brush the egg rolls with the spice mixture.
Place the cedar planks on the middle rack of the oven and roast for 10-12 minutes or until the egg rolls are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the egg rolls from the oven and sprinkle with chopped cilantro, if desired.
